category_sources: Official GitHub repository describes fastmod as a codemod-style replacement tool.
source_facts.description says fastmod is a find/replace tool for programmers.
display_name_sources: Official GitHub repository is named facebookincubator/fastmod.
docs_sources: Official GitHub README is the primary documentation surface for fastmod.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/facebookincubator/fastmod, so repo is intentionally not re-determined.
tags_sources: source_facts.description identifies it as a codemod-style find/replace tool.
source_facts.executables lists fastmod as a CLI executable.
